items.label: BREAKING
items.title: AP Exclusive: Europe has ‘maybe 6 weeks of jet fuel left,’ energy agency head warns - AP News
items.reason: Europe’s jet fuel shortage poses immediate risk to airlines and supply chains.
items.telegramHtml: 🚨 BREAKING [9/10] — 11:00 AM ET AP Exclusive: Europe has ‘maybe 6 weeks of jet fuel left,’ energy agency head warns - AP News ⚡ Europe’s jet fuel shortage poses immediate risk to airlines and supply chains.
